content:
git log supports limiting the number of commits with -n <number>.
git log supports custom output with --format=<format> or --pretty=format:<format>.
Useful placeholders include %H for commit hash, %h for abbreviated hash, %an for author name, %ae for author email, %cn for committer name, %ce for committer email, %s for subject, and %ad for author date.
Example: git log -n 5 --format="%an" prints the author names for the last 5 commits.
